caption:
Ever wonder what happens before you walk through our doors? Let's pull back the curtain.

Every morning at Rani starts the same way:

7:30 AM — Treatment rooms are sterilized and prepped. Every surface, every instrument, every device.

8:00 AM — Equipment calibration. Our RF Microneedling device, laser systems, and Sofwave unit are tested and verified before a single patient arrives.

8:15 AM — Chart review. Our clinical team reviews every patient scheduled for the day—medical history, treatment notes, progress photos, and personalized protocols.

8:30 AM — Supplies staged. Each room is set up for its specific procedures with precisely the right products, serums, and tools.

8:45 AM — Team huddle. We discuss the day's schedule, special considerations, and any adjustments needed.

9:00 AM — Doors open. And everything flows seamlessly because of the hour that came before.

Excellence isn't an accident. It's a morning routine.
mediaDescription: Behind-the-scenes Reel: Quick cuts showing morning clinic preparation. Equipment being calibrated, treatment rooms being set up, products arranged, team gathering for morning huddle. Warm, authentic footage with natural lighting. No patients shown.
